message:
feat(rch): Add E2E hook integration tests (27 tests)

Add comprehensive E2E test suite for hook integration:
- Tests for intercepted commands: cargo build/test/check, rustc,
  bun test/typecheck, gcc, make, cmake
- Tests for ignored commands: non-compilation, piped, redirected,
  backgrounded, chained, cargo fmt, bun install/watch
- Timing budget test (P99 < 5ms)
- Classification details tests
- Wrapper command tests (time, sudo, env)

Also includes fixes:
- Fix moved value issue with required_runtime.clone()
- Fix lifetime issue in circuit_state_explanation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
